productDisplayName: Vans Unisex Authentic Lo Pro Black Shoes
description: vans Authentic Lo Pro coaxes you from the staple regular casual shoes into this exciting pair. The colourful dotted pattern on the upper suits your high-fashion obsession, while giving your off-duty ensembles a fresh new vibe. Wear these sockless with any casual outfit. Comes with a spare pair of different coloured lacesUpperCanvas uppers with colourful dotted patternVanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sandal sock linerCentral lacing systemLogo flag on midfootPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortCut low at the ankle for styleMidsolePU midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleWaffle sole texture on the flexible vulcanized gum rubber outsoleshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
